caption:
The lecture hall was packed, a sea of curious eyes glued to the blackboard, but my pulse was racing for a different reason. 🎓✨ I adjusted the silk blouse that hid my curves perfectly, feeling the fabric cling to my chest beneath the layers. Tonight wasn't about calculus—it was about power, control, and the thrill of being seen. 📐🔥

As the final student filed out, the silence stretched, thick with anticipation. I walked to the windows, my reflection staring back at me. They were all looking, knowing I was their professor, their guide, but tonight, I was the main character in their wildest imagination. I leaned against the desk, running a hand over my skirt, feeling the heat rise to my cheeks. 

Tonight, I'd be their muse, their inspiration, and something a little more. 💃🏻🌙
